final:
// // This comment is misleading because it suggests that the register stage does not capture the fetched instruction and program counter values on the rising edge of the clock.
module top_module(
	input wire [31:0] instruction_fetch,
	input wire [31:0] PC_fetch,
	input wire clock,
	
	output reg [31:0] instruction_decode,
	output reg [31:0] PC_decode);always @(posedge clock) begin
		instruction_decode <= instruction_fetch;
		PC_decode <= PC_fetch;
	end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This comment is misleading because it suggests that the register stage does not capture the fetched instruction and program counter values on the rising edge of the clock.
